failure_movement.justification: Prediction expected passrate rise (+0.01 to +0.03) but actual dropped 0.71→0.68. Wrong cluster grew +7 (8→15) vs predicted stable; correct shrank -3 (71→68). Unknown did shrink -4 (21→17) but not predicted. Specific tasks (10d9b85a, 129d1232, 0bc8ad93, 0edc2aef, 157a136e) all remained failed—directionally consistent but trivially so.

trace_movement.justification: Prediction claimed completions would gain summation/enumeration language—actual aggregation-language count decreased 17→10, opposite direction. Retrieval heterogeneity claim unverifiable from JSON. Token ~flat claim (1830) is confirmed (1808.9 vs 1830.7), but that belongs to side_effects. Unverifiable span claims earn conservative partial credit.

side_effects.justification: Token consumption staying ~1830 was correct (1808.9 vs 1830.7, net -22). But wrong-answer count rising ≤1 was badly wrong: wrong cluster grew +7 (8→15), a large regression the prediction explicitly ruled out. One correct call, one severely missed regression.
